_comment: Saudi Aramco drone attack — OVX 35→49 spike on 2019-09-16. Exercises non-VIX symbol axis: same _TANH_SCALE=20.0 applied to crude oil vol, which has different baseline dynamics than equity vol.

source.description: CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (daily close)

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: SRS CLS-001 ECDF: OVX median=33.525, |deviation|=|48.58-33.525|=15.055. All 20 historical deviations are ≤ 15.055 (window spans 31.82-35.73, all deviations ≤ 2.205), so ecdf_rank=20, severity=20/20=1.00. Saudi Aramco drone attack — the market repriced OVX risk overnight. Against a calm crude-oil baseline, this is the maximum deviation in the window. Key axis: non-VIX symbol — OVX has higher baseline and narrower typical range than VIX, so the same _TANH_SCALE=20.0 produces different severity distributions. ECDF adapts automatically: 1.00 reflects the regime-relative extremeness. Tanh would give ~0.51, which undershoots.
